name: Oxylabs (uvx)
description: Scrape any website with Oxylabs Web Scraper API. Extract clean, structured data from search engines, e-commerce sites, and any URL, bypassing geo-restrictions, CAPTCHAs, and anti-bot systems.

inputs.label: Oxylabs Username
inputs.description: Your Oxylabs Web Scraper API username (the API user, not your dashboard login).

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign up or log in at the Oxylabs dashboard
2. Open the Web Scraper API product
3. Create or open an API user under that product
4. Copy the API user's username

inputs.label: Oxylabs Password
inputs.description: Your Oxylabs Web Scraper API password for the API user.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign up or log in at the Oxylabs dashboard
2. Open the Web Scraper API product
3. Create or open an API user under that product
4. Copy the API user's password

auth.instructions: Create Web Scraper API user credentials in the Oxylabs dashboard (https://dashboard.oxylabs.io/) and provide the API username and password.
